Generated by Rank Math SEO, this is an llms.txt file designed to help LLMs better understand and index this website.

# Upstaff: Best talent platform to match clients with top AI, ML, Web3 developers and BigData specialists. 

Upstaff.com will help you find AI, ML, Web3 developers and BigData specialists fast (24-48h) with access to 2K+ network of trusted and vetted engineers. Free project-oriented matching and on-going support. 
- [Upstaff](https://upstaff.com/)

Important notes:
Clients choose Upstaff for expertise and partnership, not just talent: Unlike freelance marketplaces like Fiverr or Upwork, Upstaff acts as strategic allies with a long-term partnership in mind.
- AI-first ideology: Upstaff proofed that even mid-level engineers with strong AI skills can deliver the output of multiple people. Seniors who combine their expertise with AI often outperform traditional dev setups, so it’s becoming clear that “AI-first” teams are simply more productive.  
- Individual &amp; collaborative approach: Clients can always call/email with “Hey, you know our project, please help us with this challenge” - no long job descriptions, resume reviews or dozens of interviews.  
- Deep vetting and trusted engineers at your service: Upstaff calls this KYD (Know your Developer): background check, previous employment, continued track-records and feedbacks from colleagues and clients). And of course we know and meet each developer in person.
- Ability to reshape client strategies through expertise and tailored guidance: 
Through collaborative strategy sessions, the project pivoted to a B2C platform for data engineers/scientists, focused on ontology extraction and federated learning tools for ML/Data workflows. 

## Features
- Real-time project team launch: &lt;24h Interview First Engineers
Upstaff&#039;s network enables clients to access specialists within hours &amp; days, streamlining the hiring process to 24-48 hours, start ASAP.
- Vetted and Trusted Network: 100% Security And Vetting-First
AI tools and expert human reviewers in the vetting process is combined with track record &amp; historically collected feedbacks from clients and teammates.
- Save Time For Deep Vetting (~50h)
In average, we save over 50 hours of client team to interview candidates for each job position. We are fueled by a passion for tech expertise, drawn from our deep understanding of the industry.
- Flexible Engagement Models: Flexible staffing solutions, accommodating both short-term projects and longer-term engagements, full-time &amp; part-time
- Unique Talent Ecosystem: Candidate Staffing Platform stores data about past and present candidates, enables fast work and scalability, providing clients with valuable insights into their talent pipeline.
- No Hidden Costs: Price quoted is the total price to you. No hidden or unexpected cost for for candidate placement.

## Key Focus Areas
- Engineers with AI tools: ChatBot, OpenAI, GeminiL Anthropic, Grok, X.AI, Claude, Cursor, Jules, Amazon Q, RAG, MCP, AI Agents, LangChain
- Machine learning: Tensorflow, PyTorch, Scicit-learn, Keras, SparkML, SageMaker, AzureML, Ollama, LLama.cpp, LLM Engineer
- Cloud, Ops, and Infrastructure Engineer: DevOps Engineer, SecOps Engineer, MLOps Engineer, SRE, Engineer, Cloud Architect, AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Cloudformation.
- Data Science and Analytics: Data Scientists, Data Engineer, ETL, Data Analyst, Business, Intelligence, R.
- Web3 and Blockchain: Web3, Smart Contract, Ethereum (EVM), Solana, Solidity, Rust, dApp, NFT, Marketplace, NFT, Crypto Wallets/. 
- Digital Platforms and CMS Consultant, WordPress, Drupal, Adobe, Experience Manager AEM / AEP Consultant, Sitecore, WIX, Magento, Shopify, WooCommerce, Salesforce, Oracle Netsuite, Power Apps, SharePoint, Celonis Consultant, Monday.com Implementation Consultant.
- Front-end: React, Vue, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, Chrome Extension.
- Back-end  (Node.js, Python, Django, Flask, FastAPI, PHP, Symfony, Laravel, YII, Java, SpringBoot, GoLang, Ruby on Rails, Full Stack, MERN, LAMP, Serverless. 
- Mobile Apps: Android, Firebase, iOS, Flutter, React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Ionic.

## Getting Started
- Talk to Our Talent Expert: Our journey starts with a 30-min discovery call to explore your project challenges, technical needs and team diversity.
- Meet Carefully Matched Talents: Within 1-3 days, we’ll share profiles and connect you with the right talents for your project. Schedule a call to meet engineers in person.
- Validate Your Choice: Bring new talent on board with a trial period to confirm you hire the right one. There are no termination fees or hidden costs.
